user_system_path: Issue #249 (right-now winner selection via scoreOpenLoops; risk_score + due_confidence computation) is the active seam. Issue #226 (rung-6 owner-path readiness) is COMPLETE via PR #256 (2026-06-11). Rung 7 (non-owner paid loop) is now unblocked.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and the active issue before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Active seam: issue #249 winner selection. scoreOpenLoops wired as permanent right-now source; risk_score and due_confidence computed from signals in rows; briefing scorer, workday-presence model, work-packets. Pool: 99 scorable rows, future=1.
forbidden_files_raw: No dashboard UI, no start/try/pricing pages, no acquisition agents, no Stripe, no schema migrations, no next.config changes, no new connectors, no non-owner proof.
required_browser_proof: Required — run scripts/verify-self-loop.mjs against production after wiring scoreOpenLoops as permanent path. Winner must be state_source='scored_winner', not recency fallback.
acceptance_condition: scoreOpenLoops is the permanent right-now winner source (no recency fallback); risk_score and due_confidence are computed (not flat 0/0.5); verify-self-loop.mjs PASS against production; gate:continuity/lint/build green.
stop_condition: Stop when #249 has a durable proof receipt showing scorer-path winner with non-flat risk_score/due_confidence. Next seam: rung 7 issue (non-owner paid loop).
